marketName: Fluid Power Cylinder and Actuator Manufacturing

assessments.constraintName: Rod OD Range (20-56 mm for cold-draw)
assessments.rationale: Standard piston rod ODs for tie-rod and welded cylinders fall within 20-56 mm range. Larger OD (>80 mm) mill-type rods require forging — outside ZOLLERN cold-draw scope.
C45 is the dominant piston rod material globally; 42CrMo4 for high-load applications (>=250 bar). Both are standard ZOLLERN production grades.
ZOLLERN in-line IH achieves up to 64 HRC. 42CrMo4 provides carbon assurance for reliable >=54 HRC at rod end transitions.
Cold-drawn + straightened rod blanks achieve <=0.2 mm/m — meeting the standard piston rod requirement.
ZOLLERN provides EN 10204 3.1 material test reports as standard delivery. PED traceability requirement is met.
